principle: same numerical predicate, different witness object

predicates.t2PrimeWitnessObject: lifted loop endpoint in auxiliary Spin(3)-structure on V_A
predicates.reuseRule: Do not cite as an element of SO(3) under T2'.

predicates.t2WitnessObject: quantitative witness for the central sign in G
predicates.t2PrimeWitnessObject: quantitative witness for auxiliary spin structure
predicates.reuseRule: Numerical value is stable; theoretical carrier is version-dependent.

predicates.t2PrimeWitnessObject: auxiliary sigma preserves Q_A while G acts projectively
predicates.reuseRule: Under T2', do not treat this as a faithful linear G-action on V_A.

predicates.t2PrimeWitnessObject: non-abelianness in auxiliary spin algebra compatible with so(3)
predicates.reuseRule: Use as non-abelian witness only with declared carrier.

predicates.t2WitnessObject: zeta is an element of G
predicates.t2PrimeWitnessObject: zeta is auxiliary Spin(3) data on V_A, not an element of SO(3)
predicates.reuseRule: Under T2', zeta must be cited as auxiliary polarization data.

hashChainPolicy.headChangeReason: Adding this interpretation table changes harness metadata once; numerical predicate targets are unchanged.
hashChainPolicy.futureHeadChangeRule: Change again only if harness source, numerical target, or interpretation table contents change.
